title: two sum
description: Given an array of integers and a target number, return the indices of the two numbers that add up to the target.

title: reverse string
description: Given a string, return the reversed version of it.

title: valid parentheses
description: Determine if the input string containing brackets is valid.

title: maximum subarray
description: Find the contiguous subarray which has the largest sum.

title: binary search
description: Given a sorted array and a target value, return its index or -1 if not found.

title: longest substring without repeating characters
description: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

title: detect cycle in linked list
description: Determine if a linked list has a cycle.

title: dijkstra shortest path
description: Given a weighted graph and a source node, compute the shortest path to all other nodes.

title: knapsack problem
description: Given weights and values of items, determine the maximum value that can fit in the knapsack.
